ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lifts" (
  "lift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lift */,
  "lift_name" TEXT /* Name of the lift */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the lift (e.g., specific area of the resort) */,
  "total_length" REAL /* Total length of the lift in meters */,
  "total_elevation_gain" REAL /* Total elevation gain of the lift in meters */,
  "average_slope_angle" REAL /* Average slope angle of the lift in degrees */,
  "min_elevation" REAL /* Minimum elevation of the lift in meters */,
  "max_elevation" REAL /* Maximum elevation of the lift in meters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lift was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lift was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lift_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lift_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "lift_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lift to which the segment belongs */,
  "segment_index" INTEGER /* Index of the segment within the lift (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the segment */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the segment */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the segment in meters */,
  "slope_angle" REAL /* Slope angle of the segment in degrees */,
  "for_display" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the segment is displayed in public information (True/False) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the segment in meters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the segment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the segment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lift_segments_lift_id FOREIGN KEY ("lift_id") REFERENCES lifts ("lift_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lift_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine check, repair) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the maintenance */,
  "performer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lift_maintenance_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES lift_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lift_maintenance_performer_id FOREIGN KEY ("performer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lift_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational record */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment being tracked */,
  "operation_date" TEXT /* Date of the operational record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the segment (e.g., operational, maintenance, closed) */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the status in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operational record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operational record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lift_operations_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES lift_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff, maintenance, management) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lift_segment_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment to which the image belongs */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lift_segment_images_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES lift_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lift_segment_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment to which the video belongs */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lift_segment_videos_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES lift_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lift_segment_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the segment (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lift_segment_reviews_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES lift_segments ("segment_id")
)
